description: Source material for the Bill Harris brain pack — hand-curated. Bill Harris is a fintech pioneer: ran TurboTax for 10 years, was CEO of Intuit (1999), founding CEO of PayPal/X.com (1999-2000, lasted 5 months alongside Musk and Thiel), founder/CEO of Personal Capital (2009-2019, sold to Empower for $1B at $23B AUM), and now founder/CEO of Evergreen Money / Evergreen Wealth (2024-present). He has founded 11 tech and fintech companies. Core themes: tax-aware investing, fiduciary standard, consumer financial data rights (Dodd-Frank §1033), hybrid AI+human advisory, fintech vs banks. Auto-discovery returned the wrong Bill Harris (omega-3 researcher); this list was researched and compiled by hand.

sources.title: The Investment Tax Guide: How to Slash Your Taxes (2024 edition)
sources.notes: Bill's flagship book on tax-aware investing. Top Ten Tax Strategies — tax loss harvesting, donor advised funds, after-tax vs pre-tax returns. Core voice document for tax/wealth atoms.

sources.title: Investment Tax Guide, 2017 Edition
sources.notes: Earlier edition — useful for tracking how his tax thinking evolved between 2017 and 2024.

sources.title: Thirty Minute Mentors — Episode 255: Former PayPal and Intuit CEO Bill Harris (full transcript)
sources.notes: Full transcript on Adam Mendler's site. Wide-ranging: leadership, hiring, learning from failure, PayPal chaos with Musk/Thiel, lessons from Scott Cook. Highest-density primary source.

sources.title: Thirty Minute Mentors — Episode 255 (audio)
sources.notes: Audio version of the Adam Mendler interview.

sources.title: Outspoken: Bill Harris — Barefoot Innovation Podcast (Jo Ann Barefoot)
sources.notes: May 2017 — focuses on consumer financial data rights, Dodd-Frank §1033, fiduciary standard. Bill at his most outspoken on policy. Captures Personal Capital era thinking.

sources.title: He Sold Personal Capital for $1 Billion. But Bill Harris Can't Stop Starting Businesses.
sources.notes: Substantive long-form profile. Covers career arc, Evergreen Money rationale, why he keeps starting companies. Strong narrative source.

sources.title: Bill Harris launches Evergreen Wealth, recalls PayPal 'chaos' with Elon Musk
sources.notes: InvestmentNews — Evergreen Wealth launch + extensive PayPal-era recollections. Voice quotes on Musk's boldness, Thiel's contrarianism, leadership lessons.

sources.title: Former PayPal CEO Bill Harris on Why He's Launching an RIA
sources.notes: The Daily Upside — Evergreen Wealth thesis, AI + human advisor blend, why pure-robo failed.

sources.title: Ex-PayPal CEO opines on everything from crypto to Cobol
sources.notes: Wide-ranging Payments Dive interview. Stablecoins, banks vs fintechs, legacy systems, crypto skepticism.

sources.title: This fintech launched weeks after Synapse failed. Its CEO is undaunted.
sources.notes: American Banker — Evergreen Money launch context post-Synapse collapse. His view on fintech-bank partnership risk.

sources.title: 'Most people are scared of their money': Bill Harris on his new neobank
sources.notes: American Banker — about Nirvana Money (2022, his neobank attempt before Evergreen). Behavioral finance angle.

sources.title: Fintechs are banking's Transformers. And banks aren't ready. (op-ed by Bill Harris)
sources.notes: Bill writing in his own voice. Banks-vs-fintechs thesis. Rare first-person essay.

sources.title: Personal Capital CEO Bill Harris Calls Baloney on J.P. Morgan and Intuit (LinkedIn Pulse)
sources.notes: Bill writing on consumer financial data access — JPM cutting off Intuit. First-person voice on data rights / Dodd-Frank §1033.

sources.title: How to Slash Your Taxes — Interview with Bill Harris on Financial Sense
sources.notes: Long-form podcast on tax strategy. Companion to The Investment Tax Guide book — same material in spoken form.

sources.title: Insights from the former CEO of TurboTax, PayPal, and Personal Capital — Rethink. Financial Advice
sources.notes: Acast podcast on advisor industry trends. Covers his cross-decade view of fintech evolution.

sources.title: Former Personal Capital Chairman & Founder Bill Harris Talks Entrepreneurship — Bloomberg Talks (Uncharted Summit)
sources.notes: Bloomberg Talks long-form. Uncharted Annual Summit, Southampton NY. Entrepreneurship lessons.

sources.title: Former PayPal CEO on his new company offering high-yield checking accounts (Fox Business)
sources.notes: Fox Business — Evergreen Money / Liquid Treasuries explanation. Contrarian view on banks paying nothing on checking.

sources.title: Former TurboTax Chief's Tax Advice as Deadline Looms
sources.notes: Tax advice — captures his consumer-tax-strategy voice, Intuit/TurboTax-era wisdom applied today.

sources.title: Personal Capital new breed of financial advising: CEO (CNBC, 2015)
sources.notes: 2015 CNBC — early Personal Capital pitch. 'Hybrid advisor' framing pre-acquisition. Useful for tracking thinking evolution.

sources.title: Personal Capital: Don't Call Us a 'Robo' (WealthManagement.com)
sources.notes: Bill's defining position: Personal Capital is NOT a robo-advisor. 'Virtual advice, not robo advice.' Core contrarian stance.

sources.title: Founder of Personal Capital Launches AI-Backed RIA
sources.notes: WealthManagement.com — Evergreen Wealth launch. AI + fiduciary advisor framing.

sources.title: Former Intuit CEO Bill Harris Launches Personal Capital (TechCrunch, 2011)
sources.notes: TechCrunch 2011 — Personal Capital launch. Original founding thesis, $27M raised, 40 employees.

sources.title: Fintech Pioneer Bill Harris Launches Evergreen Wealth (BusinessWire, Oct 2025)
sources.notes: Press release — Evergreen Wealth launch with $100M+ AUM. Self-funded $10M+. Useful for company facts.

sources.title: Former PayPal and Intuit CEO Bill Harris Launches Evergreen Money (PRNewswire, June 2024)
sources.notes: Press release — Evergreen Money / Liquid Treasuries launch. 5.31% yield checking pitch.

sources.title: Fintech Pioneer Bill Harris Launches Nirvana Money (PRNewswire, 2022)
sources.notes: Press release — Nirvana Money launch (his neobank attempt that preceded Evergreen). Important chapter for completeness.

sources.title: X.com (bank) — Wikipedia
sources.notes: Historical context — X.com / PayPal merger, his 5-month CEO tenure, exit dynamics. For biographical accuracy.

sources.title: Personal Capital Founder Bill Harris — Marketing Genius (Robo-Advisor Pros)
sources.notes: Third-party analysis of his Personal Capital marketing playbook. Free dashboard → AUM funnel.
